coralReef.name: Coral Reef
coralReef.desc: Warm shallow waters with colorful corals

bossGiantCrab.name: Boss: Giant Crab
bossGiantCrab.desc: Guardian of the reef's exit. Five hits with boulders will do it.

about.title: About
about.text:
Life of a Fish
An underwater platformer

Built with Three.js & Nape-JS
100% Claude Code project

Created for the
THREE.JS Water Pro giveaway

by Krisztian Somoracz

GitHub  ·  X / Twitter

player.name: You (Clownfish)
player.desc: A brave little clownfish on a quest for pearls. Small but surprisingly agile — can swim, dash, and even jump out of the water!
player.tip: Tip: Master the dash to dodge enemies and break through obstacles.

piranha.name: Piranha
piranha.desc: A vicious red predator that patrols its territory relentlessly. One bite is enough to ruin your day.
piranha.tip: Tip: Dash into it or throw a boulder to defeat it. Timing is everything.

shark.name: Shark
shark.desc: Silent shadow of the deep. It glides through the water with an eerie calm — until it catches your scent. Then there is no calm, only teeth and speed. Nothing can stop it. Nothing... except disappearing.
shark.tip: Tip: Hide in seagrass to break the chase. The shark loses sight of you among the swaying blades.

pufferfish.name: Pufferfish
pufferfish.desc: A spiky ball of pain that bobs up and down. Touching it from any direction hurts — but a well-aimed boulder can pop it.
pufferfish.tip: Tip: Watch its rhythm and swim past, or throw a boulder to get rid of it for good.

crab.name: Crab
crab.desc: A stubborn bottom-dweller guarding narrow passages. Won't hurt you directly, but its powerful claws shove you into danger.
crab.tip: Tip: It pushes you on contact. Use the momentum or avoid tight spaces near it.

toxicFish.name: Toxic Fish
toxicFish.desc: A venomous lurker that spits poison projectiles when you get close. Keeps its distance and attacks from afar.
toxicFish.tip: Tip: Dash through the projectiles or time your approach between shots.

armoredFish.name: Armored Fish
armoredFish.desc: Its scales are harder than stone. Your dash just makes it angry. Hit it with something heavier — or learn to sneak past.
armoredFish.tip: Tip: Throw a boulder or key at it. Dashing only bounces you back!

spittingCoral.name: Spitting Coral
spittingCoral.desc: A crusty polyp that spits venom in a triple fan. Every. Few. Seconds. Stand to the side and wait — or shut it up with a boulder.
spittingCoral.tip: Tip: The projectiles always go up in a fan pattern. Stay below and to the side, or throw a boulder to destroy it.

giantCrabBoss.name: Giant Crab
giantCrabBoss.desc: Ancient guardian of the reef's exit. Throws rocks in high arcs and charges with terrifying force. Its claws don't kill directly — but they can shove you straight into the jaws of the sea.
giantCrabBoss.tip: Tip: Dodge the charges and grab boulders when it pauses. Five solid hits — and the reef is yours to pass.

pearl.name: Pearl
pearl.desc: Shimmering golden pearls scattered across the ocean floor. Collect them all to complete each level.
pearl.tip: Tip: Some are hidden behind obstacles or locked inside chests.

key.name: Key
key.desc: Colorful keys in five variants — Red, Blue, Green, Yellow, and Purple. Carry one to its matching chest to unlock a hidden pearl.
key.tip: Tip: Grab a key and throw it at the chest with the same color. Keys float, so plan your route!

chest.name: Chest
chest.desc: Mysterious treasure chests sealed with a colorful lock. Each one holds a precious pearl — if you bring the right key.
chest.tip: Tip: Match the key color to the chest. You'll hear a satisfying click when it opens.

boulder.name: Boulder
boulder.desc: Heavy underwater rocks that can be picked up and thrown. They sink fast and hit hard.
boulder.tip: Tip: Throw boulders at piranhas to defeat them from a safe distance.

crate.name: Underwater Crate
crate.desc: Old wooden crates from who knows where. Smash them for fun — sometimes there's a pearl inside. Mostly just splinters.
crate.tip: Tip: Dash into crates to break them. About 1 in 3 contains a pearl!

breakableWall.name: Breakable Wall
breakableWall.desc: Cracked stone that can't take a hit. One good dash and it crumbles — revealing whatever's behind.
breakableWall.tip: Tip: Look for cracks in walls. Dash through to find hidden rooms, shortcuts, and bonus pearls.

switchToggle.name: Toggle Switch
switchToggle.desc: A green pressure pad with a spring-loaded button. One touch and the linked gate opens permanently — no going back.
switchToggle.tip: Tip: These are the easiest switches. Just swim over it and the gate stays open forever.

switchPressure.name: Pressure Switch
switchPressure.desc: A blue pressure pad that needs constant weight. The gate stays open only while something rests on it — step off and it closes.
switchPressure.tip: Tip: Push a boulder or crate onto it to keep the gate open while you swim through!

switchTimed.name: Timed Switch
switchTimed.desc: An orange lever on a pedestal. Hit it and the linked gate opens for 5 seconds — watch the lever drift back as time runs out.
switchTimed.tip: Tip: Plan your route before activating it. 5 seconds goes fast!

gate.name: Gate
gate.desc: Metal grates that block your path. They only open when their linked switch is activated.
gate.tip: Tip: Find the matching switch to open the gate. Some gates need a boulder placed on a pressure switch to stay open.

coral.name: Coral
coral.desc: Vibrant coral formations that build the reef landscape. Solid and impassable — the backbone of every level.

sand.name: Sand
sand.desc: Soft sandy blocks found on the ocean floor. Just as solid as stone, but with a warmer look.

seagrass.name: Seagrass
seagrass.desc: Tall swaying seagrass that grows in shallow waters. Its dense blades offer the perfect hiding spot — even the mighty shark loses your trail among the green.
seagrass.tip: Tip: Dive into seagrass when a shark is on your tail. It will give up the chase instantly.

hazard.name: Hazard (Spikes)
hazard.desc: Sharp spikes hidden along walls and floors. Instant damage on contact — and dashing won't save you. These bite through everything.
hazard.tip: Tip: There's no shortcut past spikes. Find another way around.

buoy.name: Buoy
buoy.desc: Floating buoys bobbing at the surface. They mark boundaries and give you something to rest on above water.

raft.name: Raft
raft.desc: Wooden rafts drifting lazily on the surface. No real use for a fish — but it's fun to flop around on them for a moment.

water.name: Water Surface
water.desc: Where the ocean meets the sky. Cross it to jump into the air — your fish flops around up there, so don't stay long!
water.tip: Tip: Jump out for hard-to-reach pearls, but gravity pulls you back fast.

floatingLog.name: Floating Log
floatingLog.desc: A waterlogged piece of driftwood drifting in the ocean. Heavy enough to hold down a pressure switch, light enough to push around. A handy underwater tool.
floatingLog.tip: Tip: Push logs onto pressure switches to keep gates open, or use them to block enemy patrol paths.

swingingAnchor.name: Swinging Anchor
swingingAnchor.desc: A heavy iron anchor hanging from a chain, swinging back and forth like a pendulum. The rust hasn't slowed it down one bit.
swingingAnchor.tip: Tip: Time your swim to pass when the anchor swings away. Don't get caught in its path!

bottle.name: Bottle Message
bottle.desc: A small corked bottle with a rolled-up note inside. Someone left these scattered across the ocean — funny notes, cryptic hints, and the occasional heartfelt message.
bottle.tip: Tip: Swim into a bottle to read its message. It disappears after collection, so savor every word.

hintStone.name: Hint Stone
hintStone.desc: An ancient stone tablet with carved symbols. Swim close to read the inscription — it glows faintly when you're near. Unlike bottles, it never disappears.
hintStone.tip: Tip: Look for hint stones near new mechanics. They often explain how things work.

stunPulse.name: Stun Pulse
stunPulse.desc: A gift from the deep — a deep-sea crystal resonated near you and granted this power. Release a pulse of energy that stuns all nearby enemies for 3 seconds, freezing them in place.
stunPulse.tip: Tip: Press Q to stun nearby enemies. 20-second cooldown. Perfect for slipping past armored fish or stopping a shark chase.

speedSurge.name: Speed Surge
speedSurge.desc: A gift from the ancients — an ancient wall inscription glowed as you passed. Grants a 4-second burst of incredible speed, boosting thrust and max velocity.
speedSurge.tip: Tip: Press R to sprint. 25-second cooldown. Use it to outrun currents, escape danger, or reach timed switches before they close.

editor.communityEmpty: You haven't published any levels yet
editor.communityNotReady: Cloud service not ready — check your connection
editor.communityUpdateConfirm: Overwrite published level "{name}" with current editor state?
